Off Calendar Jun-23-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT KHANH THAI'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment Under Code Of Civil Procedure 473, Or Alternatively 473.5 -- GRANTED PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 473(b) & 473.5; 10 days leave from notice of entry within which to file an answer. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/JB) REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR#1558
